prompt: Design a RAG assistant over a company wiki.
rubric: data/ingestion+chunking
embeddings+retrieval+rerank
serving/latency
eval+monitoring

prompt: Design a real-time credit-card fraud detection system on the transaction path (<50ms), with ~0.1% positive rate and chargeback labels arriving 30-90 days late.
rubric: clarify latency budget + asymmetric miss/false-alarm cost
model as imbalanced classification: PR-AUC / recall@fixed-precision, not accuracy
time-window aggregate features + feature store to avoid training-serving skew
baseline GBDT/rules before fancy models, tiered escalation
delayed labels: proxy/near-line monitoring + concept-drift retrain
feedback-loop trap: keep a holdout allow-through control group
failure mode: model down -> fall back to rules (fail-safe)

prompt: Design a self-hosted LLM inference service at ~5k QPS, multi-tenant, with a p99 latency SLA.
rubric: clarify QPS peak, TTFT vs TPOT targets, context length, streaming
KV-cache + continuous/in-flight batching as the throughput lever
quantization (INT8/FP8) and/or distillation + small/large model routing for cost
prefix caching + speculative decoding to cut latency
GPU autoscaling cold-start + p50 vs p99, back-of-envelope KV memory = batch x seqlen
eval: re-run golden set after any quantization/routing change
failure mode: overload -> queue/rate-limit/shed, fall back to smaller model

prompt: Design a feed/home-page recommendation system (e.g. next-video ranking).
rubric: clarify business goal -> ML objective (watch-time) + online vs offline metric (NDCG/recall@k vs CTR/retention)
multi-stage funnel: candidate generation (two-tower/ANN) -> ranking -> re-ranking
feature freshness + online/offline features + feature store for skew
cold start for new users/items + exploration vs exploitation
implicit-feedback bias: position bias, blocked-item label loss
eval: offline -> shadow -> canary -> A/B, monitor drift
back-of-envelope scale + sharded ANN + failure/fallback
